page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-4x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance configured with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and utilizing the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides dedicated CPU allocation with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring no hyperthreading overhead. It features 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary accelerator hardware consists of four NVIDIA A10 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. This GPU configuration is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the presence of four NVIDIA A10 GPUs and dedicated Intel Xeon processors, this instance is designed for GPU-intensive workloads such as deep learning inference, mid-range AI model training, high-performance graphics rendering, and video transcoding. The dedicated core model offers predictable compute performance, while the lack of local storage represents a design tradeoff that requires external storage provisioning. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the multi-GPU configuration provides a dense accelerator profile relative to the 128.0 GB system memory, making it suitable for parallelized processing tasks that do not require massive system RAM allocations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-4x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor, the instance allocates dedicated compute resources with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio and provides 128.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by four NVIDIA A10 GPUs with a total of 96 GB of VRAM, supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. It is engineered for parallelized, GPU-heavy workloads such as machine learning inference, video processing, and 3D rendering, offering a high ratio of GPU resources to system memory for cost-efficient accelerator deployment.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-4x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, four NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.

tagline: A dedicated multi-GPU compute instance featuring four accelerators and high-speed networking for parallelized processing workloads.

Four NVIDIA A10 GPUs providing a total of 96 GB VRAM
128.0 GB of system memory with dedicated CPU allocation
